<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
    function parseDecimal(value) {
        let normalized = (value || "0").toString().trim();
        normalized = normalized.replace(/\s+/g, "").replace(/R\$/g, "").replace(/\$/g, "");
        if (normalized.includes(",") && normalized.includes(".")) {
            if (normalized.lastIndexOf(",") > normalized.lastIndexOf(".")) {
                normalized = normalized.replace(/\./g, "").replace(",", ".");
            } else {
                normalized = normalized.replace(/,/g, "");
            }
        } else if (normalized.includes(",")) {
            normalized = normalized.replace(/\./g, "").replace(",", ".");
        } else {
            const parts = normalized.split(".");
            if (parts.length > 2) {
                const decimal = parts.pop();
                normalized = parts.join("") + "." + decimal;
            }
        }
        const number = Number(normalized);
        return Number.isFinite(number) ? number : 0;
    }

    function formatMoney(value) {
        return "$ " + value.toLocaleString("pt-BR", { minimumFractionDigits: 2, maximumFractionDigits: 2 });
    }

    function recalculateCotacaoTotals() {
        const totalsBySupplier = {};
        const prazoBySupplier = {};
        const prazoCountBySupplier = {};
        document.querySelectorAll(".js-cotacao-total").forEach(function (cell) {
            const supplierIndex = cell.dataset.supplierIndex;
            const quantidade = parseDecimal(cell.dataset.quantidade);
            const valueCell = cell.previousElementSibling;
            const prazoCell = cell.nextElementSibling;
            const unitInput = valueCell ? valueCell.querySelector("input[name*='_valor_unitario']") : null;
            const prazoInput = prazoCell ? prazoCell.querySelector("input[name*='_prazo_entrega_dias']") : null;
            const valorUnitario = unitInput ? parseDecimal(unitInput.value) : 0;
            const prazo = prazoInput ? parseDecimal(prazoInput.value) : 0;
            const total = quantidade * valorUnitario;
            cell.textContent = formatMoney(total);
            totalsBySupplier[supplierIndex] = (totalsBySupplier[supplierIndex] || 0) + total;
            prazoBySupplier[supplierIndex] = (prazoBySupplier[supplierIndex] || 0) + prazo;
            prazoCountBySupplier[supplierIndex] = (prazoCountBySupplier[supplierIndex] || 0) + 1;
        });

        let menorCusto = null;
        let menorPrazo = null;
        Object.keys(totalsBySupplier).forEach(function (index) {
            const total = totalsBySupplier[index] || 0;
            const prazoMedio = (prazoBySupplier[index] || 0) / Math.max(prazoCountBySupplier[index] || 1, 1);
            if (total > 0 && (menorCusto === null || total < menorCusto)) {
                menorCusto = total;
            }
            if (prazoMedio > 0 && (menorPrazo === null || prazoMedio < menorPrazo)) {
                menorPrazo = prazoMedio;
            }
        });

        document.querySelectorAll(".js-cotacao-total-geral").forEach(function (cell) {
            const index = cell.dataset.supplierIndex;
            cell.textContent = formatMoney(totalsBySupplier[index] || 0);
        });
        document.querySelectorAll(".js-cotacao-prazo-geral").forEach(function (cell) {
            const index = cell.dataset.supplierIndex;
            const prazoMedio = (prazoBySupplier[index] || 0) / Math.max(prazoCountBySupplier[index] || 1, 1);
            cell.textContent = prazoMedio > 0
                ? prazoMedio.toLocaleString("pt-BR", { minimumFractionDigits: 2, maximumFractionDigits: 2 }) + " dias"
                : "0,00 dias";
        });
        document.querySelectorAll(".js-indicador-custo-geral").forEach(function (badge) {
            const index = badge.dataset.supplierIndex;
            const total = totalsBySupplier[index] || 0;
            badge.style.display = menorCusto !== null && total === menorCusto && total > 0 ? "inline-flex" : "none";
        });
        document.querySelectorAll(".js-indicador-prazo-geral").forEach(function (badge) {
            const index = badge.dataset.supplierIndex;
            const prazoMedio = (prazoBySupplier[index] || 0) / Math.max(prazoCountBySupplier[index] || 1, 1);
            badge.style.display = menorPrazo !== null && prazoMedio === menorPrazo && prazoMedio > 0 ? "inline-flex" : "none";
        });

        document.querySelectorAll("tbody tr").forEach(function (row) {
            const valorCells = Array.from(row.querySelectorAll(".js-valor-cell"));
            const prazoCells = Array.from(row.querySelectorAll(".js-prazo-cell"));
            if (!valorCells.length && !prazoCells.length) {
                return;
            }
            const menorCustoItem = valorCells.reduce(function (acc, cell) {
                const input = cell.querySelector("input[name*='_valor_unitario']");
                const value = input ? parseDecimal(input.value) : 0;
                if (value <= 0) {
                    return acc;
                }
                return acc === null || value < acc ? value : acc;
            }, null);
            const menorPrazoItem = prazoCells.reduce(function (acc, cell) {
                const input = cell.querySelector("input[name*='_prazo_entrega_dias']");
                const value = input ? parseDecimal(input.value) : 0;
                if (value <= 0) {
                    return acc;
                }
                return acc === null || value < acc ? value : acc;
            }, null);
            valorCells.forEach(function (cell) {
                const input = cell.querySelector("input[name*='_valor_unitario']");
                const value = input ? parseDecimal(input.value) : 0;
                const badge = cell.querySelector(".js-menor-custo-item");
                if (badge) {
                    badge.style.display = menorCustoItem !== null && value === menorCustoItem && value > 0 ? "inline-flex" : "none";
                }
            });
            prazoCells.forEach(function (cell) {
                const input = cell.querySelector("input[name*='_prazo_entrega_dias']");
                const value = input ? parseDecimal(input.value) : 0;
                const badge = cell.querySelector(".js-menor-prazo-item");
                if (badge) {
                    badge.style.display = menorPrazoItem !== null && value === menorPrazoItem && value > 0 ? "inline-flex" : "none";
                }
            });
        });
    }

    document.querySelectorAll("input[name*='_valor_unitario']").forEach(function (input) {
        input.addEventListener("input", recalculateCotacaoTotals);
    });
    document.querySelectorAll("input[name*='_prazo_entrega_dias']").forEach(function (input) {
        input.addEventListener("input", recalculateCotacaoTotals);
    });
    recalculateCotacaoTotals();

    const solicitacaoSelect = document.getElementById("id_solicitacao");
    if (solicitacaoSelect) {
        solicitacaoSelect.addEventListener("change", function () {
            if (!this.value) {
                return;
            }
            const target = new URL(window.location.href);
            target.searchParams.set("solicitacao", this.value);
            window.location.href = target.toString();
        });
    }
});
</script>
{% endblock %}


========================================================================================================================

                                                <i class="bi bi-download"></i>
                                            </a>
                                        {% else %}
                                            -
                                        {% endif %}
                                    </td>
                                    <td>{{ revisao.criado_por }}</td>
                                    <td>{{ revisao.criado_em|date:"d/m/Y H:i" }}</td>
                                    <td>
                                        <small class="text-muted" title="{{ revisao.checksum }}">
                                            {{ revisao.checksum|truncatechars:12|default:"-" }}
                                        </small>
                                    </td>
                                </tr>
                            {% empty %}
                                <tr>
                                    <td colspan="7" class="text-center text-muted py-4">Nenhuma revisão encontrada.</td>
                                </tr>
                            {% endfor %}
                        </tbody>
                    </table>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

                    <small class="text-muted">Ex: ISO 7.5, ISO 9.1, ISO 8.5</small>
                </div>

                {{ form.empresa.as_hidden }}

    <div class="map-help">A leitura abaixo segue a estrutura do diagrama: do lado esquerdo, a EAP aponta para as atividades; do lado direito, cada atividade mostra suas EAPs vinculadas.</div>
</section>
{% endif %}

        <footer>
            <button type="button" class="btn secondary" id="selector-cancelar">Cancelar</button>

{% block extra_js %}
<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
    const panel = document.getElementById("selector-panel");
    const optionsContainer = document.getElementById("selector-options");
    const title = document.getElementById("selector-title");
    const subtitle = document.getElementById("selector-subtitle");
    const message = document.getElementById("selector-message");
    const csrfToken = "{{ csrf_token }}";
    let currentItemId = null;

    function abrirPainel() {
        panel.style.display = "flex";
        panel.setAttribute("aria-hidden", "false");
    }

    function fecharPainel() {
        panel.style.display = "none";
        panel.setAttribute("aria-hidden", "true");
        currentItemId = null;
        optionsContainer.innerHTML = "";
        message.textContent = "";
    }

    function renderizarOpcoes(payload) {
        optionsContainer.innerHTML = "";
        payload.opcoes.forEach(function (opcao) {
            const wrapper = document.createElement("label");
            wrapper.className = "selector-option";

            const input = document.createElement("input");
            input.type = "checkbox";
            input.value = String(opcao.id);
            input.checked = (payload.vinculos_atuais || []).includes(opcao.id);

            const content = document.createElement("div");
            const codigo = document.createElement("strong");
            codigo.textContent = opcao.codigo;
            const descricao = document.createElement("div");
            descricao.textContent = opcao.descricao;
            descricao.className = "map-help";

            if ((payload.sugestoes_ids || []).includes(opcao.id)) {
                const sugestao = document.createElement("div");
                sugestao.textContent = "Sugerido pelo codigo importado";
                sugestao.className = "map-help";
                sugestao.style.color = "#1d4ed8";
                content.appendChild(sugestao);
            }

            content.prepend(descricao);
            content.prepend(codigo);
            wrapper.appendChild(input);
            wrapper.appendChild(content);
            optionsContainer.appendChild(wrapper);
        });
    }

    document.querySelectorAll(".js-editar-vinculo").forEach(function (button) {
        button.addEventListener("click", async function () {
            currentItemId = button.dataset.itemId;
            title.textContent = "Editar Vinculos da Atividade";
            subtitle.textContent = button.dataset.itemCodigo + " - " + button.dataset.itemAtividade;
            message.textContent = "Selecione uma ou mais EAPs. O sistema aceita 1 EAP -> N atividades e N EAP -> 1 atividade, mas bloqueia N EAP -> N atividades.";
            try {
                const response = await fetch("{% url 'mapa_correspondencia_sugerir' %}?item_id=" + encodeURIComponent(currentItemId));
                const payload = await response.json();
                if (!response.ok || !payload.success) {
                    throw new Error(payload.error || "Nao foi possivel carregar as opcoes.");
                }
                renderizarOpcoes(payload);
                abrirPainel();
            } catch (error) {
                alert(error.message);
            }
        });
    });

    document.getElementById("selector-cancelar").addEventListener("click", fecharPainel);
    panel.addEventListener("click", function (event) {
        if (event.target === panel) {
            fecharPainel();
        }
    });

    document.getElementById("selector-salvar").addEventListener("click", async function () {
        if (!currentItemId) {
            return;
        }
        const selecionados = Array.from(optionsContainer.querySelectorAll("input:checked")).map(function (input) {
            return input.value;
        });
        const formData = new FormData();
        formData.append("csrfmiddlewaretoken", csrfToken);
        formData.append("item_id", currentItemId);
        selecionados.forEach(function (id) {
            formData.append("plano_contas_ids[]", id);
        });

        try {
            const response = await fetch("{% url 'mapa_correspondencia_vincular' %}", {
                method: "POST",
                body: formData,
            });
            const payload = await response.json();
            if (!response.ok || !payload.success) {
                throw new Error(payload.error || "Nao foi possivel salvar os vinculos.");
            }
            window.location.reload();
        } catch (error) {
            alert(error.message);
        }
    });
});
</script>
{% endblock %}

        {% csrf_token %}
        {% for field in form %}
        <div class="field">

            {{ field }}
            {% if field.errors %}
                <div style="color:#b91c1c; margin-top:6px;">{{ field.errors }}</div>

        {% endfor %}

            {% if item_formset.non_form_errors %}

            {% endif %}
            <table class="compact-table item-table">
                <thead>
                    <tr>
                        <th>Centro de Custo</th>

                    {% for item_form in item_formset %}
                    <tr{% if not item_form.instance.pk and forloop.counter0 > 0 and not item_form.errors %} class="empty-row"{% endif %}>
                        <td>
                            {{ item_form.id }}
                            {{ item_form.centro_custo }}
                            {{ item_form.centro_custo.errors }}
                        </td>

                <p class="muted inline-note">O valor medido será calculado automaticamente pela soma de quantidade x valor unitário dos itens.</p>
            </div>
        </div>

            <button class="btn" type="submit">Salvar</button>
            <a class="btn secondary" href="{{ voltar_url }}">Voltar</a>
        </div>

<template id="item-medicao-empty-form">
    <tr>
        <td>
            {{ item_formset.empty_form.id }}
            {{ item_formset.empty_form.centro_custo }}
        </td>
        <td>{{ item_formset.empty_form.unidade }}</td>
        <td class="text-right">{{ item_formset.empty_form.quantidade }}</td>
        <td class="text-right">{{ item_formset.empty_form.valor_unitario }}</td>
        <td></td>
    </tr>
</template>

<script>
(() => {
    const contratoField = document.getElementById("id_contrato");
    const fornecedorField = document.getElementById("id_fornecedor_info");
    const cnpjField = document.getElementById("id_cnpj_info");
    const responsavelField = document.getElementById("id_responsavel_info");
    const totalForms = document.getElementById("id_itens-TOTAL_FORMS");
    const tbody = document.getElementById("itens-medicao-body");
    const addButton = document.getElementById("adicionar-item-medicao");
    const template = document.getElementById("item-medicao-empty-form");
    let currentOptions = [];

    const firstSelect = tbody.querySelector("select");
    if (firstSelect) {
        currentOptions = Array.from(firstSelect.options)
            .filter((option) => option.value)
            .map((option) => {
                const texto = option.textContent.split(" - ");
                return {
                    id: option.value,
                    codigo: texto[0] || "",
                    descricao: texto.slice(1).join(" - "),
                };
            });
    }

    function limparInfos() {
        fornecedorField.value = "";
        cnpjField.value = "";
        responsavelField.value = "";
    }

    function linhasAtivas() {
        return Array.from(tbody.querySelectorAll("tr")).filter((row) => !row.classList.contains("empty-row"));
    }

    function rebuildOptions(options) {
        const rows = linhasAtivas();
        rows.forEach((row) => {
            const select = row.querySelector("select");
            if (!select) return;
            const valorAtual = select.value;
            select.innerHTML = '<option value="">---------</option>';
            options.forEach((option) => {
                const opt = document.createElement("option");
                opt.value = option.id;
                opt.textContent = `${option.codigo} - ${option.descricao}`;
                if (String(option.id) === valorAtual) {
                    opt.selected = true;
                }
                select.appendChild(opt);
            });
            if (![...select.options].some((option) => option.value === valorAtual)) {
                select.value = "";
            }
            preencherCamposDaLinha(row, select.value);
        });
    }

    function preencherCamposDaLinha(row, centroId) {
        const unidadeInput = row.querySelector("input[name$='unidade']");
        const valorUnitarioInput = row.querySelector("input[name$='valor_unitario']");
        const item = currentOptions.find((option) => String(option.id) === String(centroId));

        if (!unidadeInput || !valorUnitarioInput) {
            return;
        }

        if (!item) {
            unidadeInput.value = "";
            valorUnitarioInput.value = "";
            return;
        }

        unidadeInput.value = item.unidade || "";
        valorUnitarioInput.value = item.valor_unitario || "";
    }

    function bindRow(row) {
        const select = row.querySelector("select");
        if (!select || select.dataset.bound === "true") {
            return;
        }
        select.dataset.bound = "true";
        select.addEventListener("change", () => preencherCamposDaLinha(row, select.value));
        preencherCamposDaLinha(row, select.value);
    }

    function bindAllRows() {
        Array.from(tbody.querySelectorAll("tr")).forEach(bindRow);
    }

    function showHiddenRow() {
        const hiddenRow = tbody.querySelector(".empty-row");
        if (!hiddenRow) return false;
        hiddenRow.classList.remove("empty-row");
        rebuildOptions(currentOptions);
        return true;
    }

    addButton.addEventListener("click", () => {
        if (showHiddenRow()) {
            return;
        }

        const index = Number(totalForms.value);
        const html = template.innerHTML.replaceAll("__prefix__", index);
        tbody.insertAdjacentHTML("beforeend", html);
        totalForms.value = index + 1;
        rebuildOptions(currentOptions);
        bindAllRows();
    });

    async function carregarContrato() {
        const contratoId = contratoField.value;
        if (!contratoId) {
            limparInfos();
            rebuildOptions([]);
            return;
        }

        const response = await fetch(`/contratos/${contratoId}/dados/`);
        if (!response.ok) {
            limparInfos();
            rebuildOptions([]);
            return;
        }

        const data = await response.json();
        fornecedorField.value = data.fornecedor || "";
        cnpjField.value = data.cnpj || "";
        responsavelField.value = data.responsavel || "";
        currentOptions = data.centros_custo || [];
        rebuildOptions(currentOptions);
    }

    contratoField.addEventListener("change", carregarContrato);
    bindAllRows();
    if (contratoField.value) {
        carregarContrato();
    }
})();
</script>
{% endblock %}

        <div class="field">
            <label>Rateio por Centro de Custo</label>
            {{ rateio_formset.management_form }}
            {% if rateio_formset.non_form_errors %}
                <div style="color:#b91c1c; margin-bottom:10px;">{{ rateio_formset.non_form_errors }}</div>
            {% endif %}
            <table class="compact-table item-table">
                <thead>
                    <tr>
                        <th>Centro de Custo</th>
                        <th class="text-right">Valor</th>
                        <th>Excluir</th>
                    </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody id="rateio-body">
                    {% for rateio_form in rateio_formset %}
                    <tr{% if not rateio_form.instance.pk and forloop.counter0 > 0 and not rateio_form.errors %} class="empty-row"{% endif %}>
                        <td>
                            {{ rateio_form.id }}
                            {{ rateio_form.centro_custo }}
                            {{ rateio_form.centro_custo.errors }}
                        </td>
                        <td class="text-right">{{ rateio_form.valor }}{{ rateio_form.valor.errors }}</td>
                        <td>{% if rateio_form.instance.pk %}{{ rateio_form.DELETE }}{% endif %}</td>
                    </tr>
                    {% endfor %}
                </tbody>
            </table>
            <div class="table-actions">
                <button type="button" class="btn secondary" id="adicionar-rateio">Adicionar Centro de Custo</button>
                <p class="muted inline-note">Os centros de custo disponíveis no rateio seguem a medição ou o pedido selecionado.</p>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="actions">
            <button class="btn" type="submit">Salvar</button>
            <a class="btn secondary" href="{{ voltar_url }}">Voltar</a>
        </div>
    </form>
</section>
</div>

<template id="rateio-empty-form">
    <tr>
        <td>
            {{ rateio_formset.empty_form.id }}
            {{ rateio_formset.empty_form.centro_custo }}
        </td>
        <td class="text-right">{{ rateio_formset.empty_form.valor }}</td>
        <td></td>
    </tr>
</template>

<script>
(() => {
    const medicaoField = document.getElementById("id_medicao");
    const pedidoField = document.getElementById("id_pedido_compra");
    const fornecedorField = document.getElementById("id_fornecedor");
    const cnpjField = document.getElementById("id_cnpj");
    const origemInfoField = document.getElementById("id_origem_info");
    const totalForms = document.getElementById("id_rateio-TOTAL_FORMS");
    const tbody = document.getElementById("rateio-body");
    const addButton = document.getElementById("adicionar-rateio");
    const template = document.getElementById("rateio-empty-form");
    let currentOptions = [];

    function linhasAtivas() {
        return Array.from(tbody.querySelectorAll("tr")).filter((row) => !row.classList.contains("empty-row"));
    }

    function limparOrigem() {
        fornecedorField.value = "";
        cnpjField.value = "";
        origemInfoField.value = "";
        currentOptions = [];
        rebuildRateioRows([]);
    }

    function preencherOrigem(data, origem) {
        fornecedorField.value = data.fornecedor || "";
        cnpjField.value = data.cnpj || "";
        origemInfoField.value = origem;
        currentOptions = data.centros_custo || [];
        rebuildRateioRows(currentOptions);
    }

    function setOptions(select, options, selectedValue = "") {
        select.innerHTML = '<option value="">---------</option>';
        options.forEach((option) => {
            const opt = document.createElement("option");
            opt.value = option.id;
            opt.textContent = `${option.codigo} - ${option.descricao}`;
            if (String(option.id) === String(selectedValue)) {
                opt.selected = true;
            }
            select.appendChild(opt);
        });
        if (![...select.options].some((option) => option.value === String(selectedValue))) {
            select.value = "";
        }
    }

    function showHiddenRow() {
        const hiddenRow = tbody.querySelector(".empty-row");
        if (!hiddenRow) return null;
        hiddenRow.classList.remove("empty-row");
        return hiddenRow;
    }

    function addRow() {
        const hiddenRow = showHiddenRow();
        if (hiddenRow) {
            return hiddenRow;
        }
        const index = Number(totalForms.value);
        const html = template.innerHTML.replaceAll("__prefix__", index);
        tbody.insertAdjacentHTML("beforeend", html);
        totalForms.value = index + 1;
        return tbody.lastElementChild;
    }

    function rebuildRateioRows(options) {
        const rows = linhasAtivas();
        rows.forEach((row, index) => {
            const select = row.querySelector("select");
            if (select) {
                setOptions(select, options, index < options.length ? options[index].id : select.value);
            }
        });

        while (linhasAtivas().length < options.length) {
            const row = addRow();
            const rowIndex = linhasAtivas().length - 1;
            const select = row.querySelector("select");
            if (select) {
                setOptions(select, options, options[rowIndex]?.id || "");
            }
        }

        linhasAtivas().forEach((row) => {
            const select = row.querySelector("select");
            if (select) {
                setOptions(select, options, select.value);
            }
        });
    }

    async function carregarPedido() {
        const pedidoId = pedidoField.value;
        if (!pedidoId) {
            if (!medicaoField.value) {
                limparOrigem();
            }
            return;
        }
        medicaoField.value = "";
        const response = await fetch(`/contratos/${pedidoId}/dados/`);
        if (!response.ok) {
            limparOrigem();
            return;
        }
        const data = await response.json();
        preencherOrigem(data, `Pedido ${pedidoField.options[pedidoField.selectedIndex].text}`);
    }

    async function carregarMedicao() {
        const medicaoId = medicaoField.value;
        if (!medicaoId) {
            if (!pedidoField.value) {
                limparOrigem();
            }
            return;
        }
        pedidoField.value = "";
        const response = await fetch(`/medicoes/${medicaoId}/dados/`);
        if (!response.ok) {
            limparOrigem();
            return;
        }
        const data = await response.json();
        preencherOrigem(data, medicaoField.options[medicaoField.selectedIndex].text);
    }

    addButton.addEventListener("click", () => {
        const row = addRow();
        const select = row.querySelector("select");
        if (select) {
            setOptions(select, currentOptions);
        }
    });

    pedidoField.addEventListener("change", carregarPedido);
    medicaoField.addEventListener("change", carregarMedicao);
    if (pedidoField.value) {
        carregarPedido();
    } else if (medicaoField.value) {
        carregarMedicao();
    }
})();
</script>
{% endblock %}


========================================================================================================================

<style>
/* Controla abrir e fechar do modal de rateios. */
.modal-notas.hidden { display:none; }
/* Controla o overlay escuro do modal de rateios. */
.modal-notas {
    position: fixed;
    inset: 0;
    background: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.55);
    z-index: 1000;
    padding: 24px;
}
/* Controla o tamanho útil e a rolagem interna do conteúdo do modal. */
.modal-notas-content {
    max-width: 980px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(56,56,56,.98) 0%, rgba(34,34,34,.98) 100%);
    color: var(--white);
    border: 1px solid rgba(200,200,200,.14);
    border-top: 4px solid var(--graphite-soft);
    border-radius: 16px;
    padding: 20px;
    max-height: calc(100vh - 48px);
    overflow: auto;
}
</style>
<script>
function fecharRateios() {
  document.getElementById('modal-rateios').classList.add('hidden');
}

function renderRateios(payload) {
  const corpo = document.getElementById('modal-rateios-corpo');
  document.getElementById('modal-rateios-titulo').textContent = `Rateios da Nota ${payload.numero}`;
  document.getElementById('modal-rateios-subtitulo').textContent = `${payload.fornecedor} | Emissao: ${payload.data_emissao} | Vencimento: ${payload.data_vencimento} | Cadastro: ${payload.data_cadastro}`;
  const linhas = (payload.rateios || []).map((item) => `
    <tr>
      <td>${item.centro_custo}</td>
      <td class="money">${item.valor}</td>
    </tr>
  `).join('');
  corpo.innerHTML = `
    <div class="panel" style="margin-bottom:12px;">
      <strong>Descrição:</strong> ${payload.descricao}<br>
      <strong>Valor Total:</strong> ${payload.valor_total}
    </div>
    <table class="compact-table">
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th>Centro de Custo</th>
          <th class="text-right">Valor Rateado</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        ${linhas || '<tr><td colspan="2">Nenhum rateio registrado.</td></tr>'}
      </tbody>
    </table>
  `;
}

async function abrirRateios(url) {
  const resposta = await fetch(url, {headers: {'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest'}});
  if (!resposta.ok) {
     alert('Não foi possível carregar os rateios.');
    return;
  }
  renderRateios(await resposta.json());
  document.getElementById('modal-rateios').classList.remove('hidden');
}
</script>
{% if is_paginated %}
<div class="panel" style="margin-top:16px;">
    <div class="toolbar" style="justify-content:space-between; gap:12px; flex-wrap:wrap;">
        <span class="muted">Pagina {{ page_obj.number }} de {{ page_obj.paginator.num_pages }}</span>
        <div style="display:flex; gap:8px; align-items:center; flex-wrap:wrap;">
            {% if page_obj.has_previous %}
            <a class="btn secondary" href="?{% if querystring_sem_pagina %}{{ querystring_sem_pagina }}&{% endif %}page=1">Primeira</a>
            <a class="btn secondary" href="?{% if querystring_sem_pagina %}{{ querystring_sem_pagina }}&{% endif %}page={{ page_obj.previous_page_number }}">Anterior</a>
            {% endif %}
            {% if page_obj.has_next %}
            <a class="btn secondary" href="?{% if querystring_sem_pagina %}{{ querystring_sem_pagina }}&{% endif %}page={{ page_obj.next_page_number }}">Proxima</a>
            <a class="btn secondary" href="?{% if querystring_sem_pagina %}{{ querystring_sem_pagina }}&{% endif %}page={{ page_obj.paginator.num_pages }}">Ultima</a>
            {% endif %}
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
{% endif %}
  {% endblock %}

<section class="panel">
    <h3>Erros Recentes</h3>
    {% if erros_recentes %}
    <div class="table-scroll">
        <table class="compact-table" style="min-width:1100px;">
            <thead>
                <tr>
                    <th>Horario</th>
                    <th>Classe</th>
                    <th>Path</th>
                    <th>Status</th>
                    <th>Mensagem</th>
                    <th>Request ID</th>
                    <th>Resolvido</th>
                </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
                {% for erro in erros_recentes %}
                <tr>
                    <td>{{ erro.criado_em|date:"d/m/Y H:i:s" }}</td>
                    <td>{{ erro.classe_erro }}</td>
                    <td>{{ erro.path }}</td>
                    <td>{{ erro.status_code }}</td>
                    <td class="wrap-text">{{ erro.mensagem }}</td>
                    <td>{{ erro.request_id }}</td>

    {% endif %}

                        <div class="acoes-links">
                            <a href="{% url 'plano_contas_update' plano.pk %}">Editar</a>
                            <form method="post" action="{% url 'plano_contas_delete' %}" onsubmit="event.stopPropagation(); return confirm('Excluir este centro de custo?');" style="display:inline;">
                                {% csrf_token %}
                                <input type="hidden" name="id" value="{{ plano.pk }}">
                                <button type="submit" class="link-button">Excluir</button>
                            </form>
                        </div>
                    </td>
                </tr>
                {% endfor %}
            </tbody>
        </table>
    </div>
    {% else %}
    <p class="empty">Nenhum item encontrado.</p>
    {% endif %}
</section>

<div id="notas-modal" class="modal-shell" hidden>
    <div class="modal-backdrop" data-close-modal></div>
    <section class="modal-card">

<style>
    .baseline-box {

    /* Controla a largura mínima e o comportamento geral da tabela principal do plano de contas. */

        padding-bottom: 6px;

    /* Controla quebra de texto, alinhamento vertical e legibilidade das células. */

    .plano-table td {

<script>
(() => {
    const modal = document.getElementById("notas-modal");
    const modalTitle = document.getElementById("notas-modal-title");
    const modalSubtitle = document.getElementById("notas-modal-subtitle");
    const modalContent = document.getElementById("notas-modal-content");
    const planoTable = document.querySelector(".plano-table");
    let highlightedColumnIndex = null;

    function fecharModal() {
        modal.hidden = true;
    }

    function abrirModal() {
        modal.hidden = false;
    }

    function renderTabelaNotas(payload) {
        if (!payload.notas.length) {
            modalContent.innerHTML = '<p class="muted">Nenhuma nota fiscal apropriada neste centro de custo.</p>';
            return;
        }

        const linhas = payload.notas.map((nota) => `
            <tr>
                <td>${nota.id}</td>
                <td>${nota.numero}</td>
                <td>${nota.cnpj}</td>
                <td>${nota.fornecedor}</td>
                <td>${nota.descricao}</td>
                <td>${nota.centro_custo}</td>
                <td class="text-right">${nota.valor}</td>
                <td>${nota.data}</td>
            </tr>
        `).join("");

        modalContent.innerHTML = `
            <table class="modal-notas-table">
                <thead>
                    <tr>
                        <th>ID</th>
                        <th>Número da Nota</th>
                        <th>CNPJ</th>
                        <th>Fornecedor</th>
                        <th>Descrição</th>
                        <th>Centro de Custo</th>
                        <th class="text-right">Valor Apropriado</th>
                        <th>Data</th>
                    </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody>${linhas}</tbody>
            </table>
        `;
    }

    function aplicarDestaqueColuna(indice) {
        if (!planoTable) {
            return;
        }
        planoTable.querySelectorAll("th, td").forEach((celula) => {
            celula.classList.remove("column-highlight");
        });
        if (indice === null || indice === undefined) {
            highlightedColumnIndex = null;
            return;
        }
        planoTable.querySelectorAll("tr").forEach((linha) => {
            const celula = linha.children[indice];
            if (celula) {
                celula.classList.add("column-highlight");
            }
        });
        highlightedColumnIndex = indice;
    }

    async function carregarNotas(url) {
        modalSubtitle.textContent = "Carregando...";
        modalContent.innerHTML = '<p class="muted">Carregando notas...</p>';
        abrirModal();
        const response = await fetch(url);
        if (!response.ok) {
            modalSubtitle.textContent = "Erro";
            modalContent.innerHTML = '<p class="muted">Não foi possível carregar as notas deste centro de custo.</p>';
            return;
        }
        const payload = await response.json();
        modalTitle.textContent = "Notas do Centro de Custo";
        modalSubtitle.textContent = `${payload.centro_custo} | ${payload.quantidade_notas} nota(s)`;
        renderTabelaNotas(payload);
    }

    document.querySelectorAll(".plano-row").forEach((row) => {
        row.addEventListener("click", () => carregarNotas(row.dataset.notasUrl));
    });

    planoTable?.querySelectorAll("thead th[data-column-index]").forEach((header) => {
        header.addEventListener("click", (event) => {
            event.stopPropagation();
            const indice = Number(header.dataset.columnIndex);
            if (highlightedColumnIndex === indice) {
                aplicarDestaqueColuna(null);
            } else {
                aplicarDestaqueColuna(indice);
            }
        });
    });

    document.querySelectorAll("[data-close-modal]").forEach((element) => {
        element.addEventListener("click", fecharModal);
    });
})();
</script>
{% endblock %}


========================================================================================================================


# ARQUIVO: C:\Users\ACER\Documents\New project\Construtask_2.0_restaurado\Construtask\templates\app\plano_fisico_dashboard.html

{% block extra_js %}
{% if curva_planejada %}
<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
    const canvas = document.getElementById('curvaSChart');
    if (!canvas) return;
    const planejada = [
        {% for p in curva_planejada %}
        { mes: "{{ p.mes }}", acumulado: {{ p.acumulado|unlocalize }} }{% if not forloop.last %},{% endif %}
        {% endfor %}
    ];
    const realizada = [
        {% for r in curva_realizada %}
        { mes: "{{ r.mes }}", acumulado: {{ r.acumulado|unlocalize }} }{% if not forloop.last %},{% endif %}
        {% endfor %}
    ];

    function desenharCurvaS(canvas, seriePlanejada, serieRealizada) {
        const wrapperWidth = canvas.parentElement ? canvas.parentElement.clientWidth : 900;
        const width = Math.max(wrapperWidth, 640);
        const height = 320;
        canvas.width = width;
        canvas.height = height;
        canvas.style.width = "100%";
        canvas.style.height = height + "px";

        const g = canvas.getContext("2d");
        const labels = [...new Set([...seriePlanejada.map(i => i.mes), ...serieRealizada.map(i => i.mes)])].sort();
        if (!labels.length) return;

        const mapPlanejada = Object.fromEntries(seriePlanejada.map(i => [i.mes, Number(i.acumulado || 0)]));
        const mapRealizada = Object.fromEntries(serieRealizada.map(i => [i.mes, Number(i.acumulado || 0)]));

        let ultimoPlanejado = 0;
        let ultimoRealizado = 0;
        const pontosPlanejada = labels.map((mes) => {
            ultimoPlanejado = mapPlanejada[mes] ?? ultimoPlanejado;
            return { mes, valor: ultimoPlanejado };
        });
        const pontosRealizada = labels.map((mes) => {
            ultimoRealizado = mapRealizada[mes] ?? ultimoRealizado;
            return { mes, valor: ultimoRealizado };
        });

        const maxValor = Math.max(1, ...pontosPlanejada.map(p => p.valor), ...pontosRealizada.map(p => p.valor));
        const padding = { top: 24, right: 28, bottom: 46, left: 70 };
        const chartWidth = width - padding.left - padding.right;
        const chartHeight = height - padding.top - padding.bottom;

        g.clearRect(0, 0, width, height);
        g.fillStyle = "rgba(255,255,255,0.02)";
        g.fillRect(0, 0, width, height);
        g.strokeStyle = "rgba(255,255,255,0.14)";
        g.lineWidth = 1;
        g.beginPath();
        g.moveTo(padding.left, padding.top);
        g.lineTo(padding.left, padding.top + chartHeight);
        g.lineTo(padding.left + chartWidth, padding.top + chartHeight);
        g.stroke();

        g.font = "12px Aptos, Segoe UI, sans-serif";
        g.fillStyle = "rgba(255,255,255,0.70)";
        g.textAlign = "right";
        g.textBaseline = "middle";
        const steps = 4;
        for (let i = 0; i <= steps; i++) {
            const valor = (maxValor / steps) * i;
            const y = padding.top + chartHeight - (chartHeight * i / steps);
            g.strokeStyle = "rgba(255,255,255,0.08)";
            g.beginPath();
            g.moveTo(padding.left, y);
            g.lineTo(padding.left + chartWidth, y);
            g.stroke();
            g.fillText(valor.toLocaleString("pt-BR", { minimumFractionDigits: 0, maximumFractionDigits: 0 }), padding.left - 10, y);
        }

        function coordenadas(pontos) {
            return pontos.map((p, index) => {
                const x = labels.length === 1 ? padding.left + chartWidth / 2 : padding.left + (chartWidth * index / (labels.length - 1));
                const y = padding.top + chartHeight - ((p.valor / maxValor) * chartHeight);
                return { ...p, x, y };
            });
        }

        function desenharLinha(pontos, corLinha, corArea) {
            if (!pontos.length) return;
            const coords = coordenadas(pontos);
            g.beginPath();
            g.moveTo(coords[0].x, padding.top + chartHeight);
            coords.forEach((p) => g.lineTo(p.x, p.y));
            g.lineTo(coords[coords.length - 1].x, padding.top + chartHeight);
            g.closePath();
            g.fillStyle = corArea;
            g.fill();

            g.beginPath();
            coords.forEach((p, index) => {
                if (index === 0) g.moveTo(p.x, p.y);
                else g.lineTo(p.x, p.y);
            });
            g.strokeStyle = corLinha;
            g.lineWidth = 3;
            g.stroke();
        }

        desenharLinha(pontosPlanejada, "#2563eb", "rgba(37,99,235,0.14)");
        if (pontosRealizada.some(p => p.valor > 0)) {
            desenharLinha(pontosRealizada, "#16a34a", "rgba(22,163,74,0.12)");
        }

        g.textAlign = "center";
        g.textBaseline = "top";
        g.fillStyle = "rgba(255,255,255,0.68)";
        labels.forEach((mes, index) => {
            const x = labels.length === 1 ? padding.left + chartWidth / 2 : padding.left + (chartWidth * index / (labels.length - 1));
            g.fillText(mes, x, padding.top + chartHeight + 10);
        });
    }

    desenharCurvaS(canvas, planejada, realizada);
    window.addEventListener("resize", function () {
        desenharCurvaS(canvas, planejada, realizada);
    });
});
</script>
{% endif %}
{% endblock %}

        {% if itens_criticos %}
        <table class="compact-table">
            <thead>

                    <th>Atividade</th>
                    <th class="text-right">Desvio</th>
                    <th class="text-right">% Prev.</th>
                    <th class="text-right">% Real.</th>
                </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
                {% for item in itens_criticos %}
                <tr>
                    <td>{{ item.codigo_atividade }}</td>
                    <td class="wrap-text">{{ item.atividade }}</td>
                    <td class="money">{{ item.dias_desvio_exibicao }}</td>
                    <td class="money">{{ item.percentual_previsto_exibicao|trunc2 }}%</td>
                    <td class="money">{{ item.percentual_realizado_exibicao|trunc2 }}%</td>
                </tr>
                {% endfor %}
            </tbody>
        </table>
        {% else %}
        <p class="empty">Nenhuma atividade critica por atraso.</p>
        {% endif %}
    </div>

    <div class="panel">
        <h3>Curva S</h3>
        {% if curva_planejada %}
        <canvas id="curvaSChart" height="120"></canvas>
        {% else %}
        <p class="empty">Curva S indisponivel para este cronograma.</p>
        {% endif %}
    </div>
</section>

<section class="panel">
    <div class="toolbar">
        <div>
            <h3>Atividades do Cronograma</h3>
            <p>Lance o realizado diretamente nas atividades filhas e use o botão abaixo para atualizar o cronograma.</p>
        </div>
        <div>
            <button type="button" class="btn" onclick="submeterAtualizacaoCronograma();">Atualizar Cronograma</button>
        </div>
    </div>
    {% if itens %}
    <form method="post" id="cronograma-realizado-form">

        <input type="hidden" name="acao" value="atualizar_cronograma">
        <input type="hidden" name="cronograma_realizado_payload" id="cronograma-realizado-payload">
        <div style="overflow-x:auto;">
            <table class="compact-table cronograma-table">
                <thead>
                    <tr>
                        <th class="nowrap">Codigo</th>
                        <th>Atividade</th>

                        <th class="nowrap">Fim Prev.</th>
                        <th class="nowrap">Inicio Real</th>
                        <th class="nowrap">Fim Real</th>
                        <th class="text-right nowrap">% Prev.</th>
                        <th class="text-right nowrap">% Real.</th>
                        <th class="text-right nowrap">Realizado</th>

                        <th class="text-right nowrap">Desvio</th>

                        <th class="text-right nowrap">Vlr. Realizado</th>
                        <th class="nowrap">Acoes</th>
                    </tr>
                </thead>

                        <td class="nowrap">{{ item.codigo_atividade }}</td>
                        <td class="wrap-text">
                            <div style="padding-left: {{ item.nivel_exibicao|default:0 }}0px;">
                                <span class="{% if item.tem_filhos_exibicao %}cronograma-item-pai{% endif %}">
                                    {% if item.is_marco %}<strong>[Marco]</strong> {% endif %}
                                    {{ item.atividade }}
                                </span>
                            </div>
                        </td>
                        <td class="nowrap">{% if item.inicio_previsto_exibicao %}{{ item.inicio_previsto_exibicao|date:"d/m/Y" }}{% else %}Nao informado{% endif %}</td>
                        <td class="nowrap">{% if item.fim_previsto_exibicao %}{{ item.fim_previsto_exibicao|date:"d/m/Y" }}{% else %}Nao informado{% endif %}</td>
                        <td class="nowrap">{% if item.inicio_real_exibicao %}{{ item.inicio_real_exibicao|date:"d/m/Y" }}{% else %}Nao informado{% endif %}</td>
                        <td class="nowrap">{% if item.fim_real_exibicao %}{{ item.fim_real_exibicao|date:"d/m/Y" }}{% else %}Nao informado{% endif %}</td>
                        <td class="money nowrap">{{ item.percentual_previsto_exibicao|trunc2 }}%</td>

                        <td class="money nowrap">
                            {% if item.tem_filhos_exibicao %}
                                <span class="badge bg-dark">{{ item.percentual_realizado_exibicao|trunc2 }}%</span>
                            {% else %}
                                <input
                                    type="number"
                                    min="0"
                                    max="100"
                                    step="1"
                                    name="realizado_{{ item.pk|unlocalize }}"
                                    data-item-pk="{{ item.pk|unlocalize }}"

                                    class="cronograma-realizado-input"
                                >
                            {% endif %}
                        </td>
                        <td class="money nowrap">{{ item.duracao_exibicao }}</td>

<script>
function submeterAtualizacaoCronograma() {
    const form = document.getElementById('cronograma-realizado-form');
    if (!form) return;
    const payloadInput = document.getElementById('cronograma-realizado-payload');
    const payload = {};
    form.querySelectorAll('.cronograma-realizado-input[data-item-pk]').forEach((input) => {
        payload[input.dataset.itemPk] = input.value;
    });
    if (payloadInput) {
        payloadInput.value = JSON.stringify(payload);
    }
    form.submit();
}
</script>
{% endblock %}

{% block extra_js %}
{% if curva_planejada %}
<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
    const ctx = document.getElementById("curvaSChart");
    if (!ctx) return;
    const planejada = [
        {% for p in curva_planejada %}
        { mes: "{{ p.mes }}", acumulado: {{ p.acumulado|unlocalize }} }{% if not forloop.last %},{% endif %}
        {% endfor %}
    ];
    const realizada = [
        {% for r in curva_realizada %}
        { mes: "{{ r.mes }}", acumulado: {{ r.acumulado|unlocalize }} }{% if not forloop.last %},{% endif %}
        {% endfor %}
    ];

    function desenharCurvaS(canvas, seriePlanejada, serieRealizada) {
        const wrapperWidth = canvas.parentElement ? canvas.parentElement.clientWidth : 900;
        const width = Math.max(wrapperWidth, 640);
        const height = 320;
        canvas.width = width;
        canvas.height = height;
        canvas.style.width = "100%";
        canvas.style.height = height + "px";

        const g = canvas.getContext("2d");
        const labels = [...new Set([...seriePlanejada.map(i => i.mes), ...serieRealizada.map(i => i.mes)])].sort();
        if (!labels.length) return;

        const mapPlanejada = Object.fromEntries(seriePlanejada.map(i => [i.mes, Number(i.acumulado || 0)]));
        const mapRealizada = Object.fromEntries(serieRealizada.map(i => [i.mes, Number(i.acumulado || 0)]));

        let ultimoPlanejado = 0;
        let ultimoRealizado = 0;
        const pontosPlanejada = labels.map((mes) => {
            ultimoPlanejado = mapPlanejada[mes] ?? ultimoPlanejado;
            return { mes, valor: ultimoPlanejado };
        });
        const pontosRealizada = labels.map((mes) => {
            ultimoRealizado = mapRealizada[mes] ?? ultimoRealizado;
            return { mes, valor: ultimoRealizado };
        });

        const maxValor = Math.max(
            1,
            ...pontosPlanejada.map(p => p.valor),
            ...pontosRealizada.map(p => p.valor)
        );

        const padding = { top: 24, right: 28, bottom: 46, left: 70 };
        const chartWidth = width - padding.left - padding.right;
        const chartHeight = height - padding.top - padding.bottom;

        g.clearRect(0, 0, width, height);
        g.fillStyle = "rgba(255,255,255,0.02)";
        g.fillRect(0, 0, width, height);

        g.strokeStyle = "rgba(255,255,255,0.14)";
        g.lineWidth = 1;
        g.beginPath();
        g.moveTo(padding.left, padding.top);
        g.lineTo(padding.left, padding.top + chartHeight);
        g.lineTo(padding.left + chartWidth, padding.top + chartHeight);
        g.stroke();

        g.font = "12px Aptos, Segoe UI, sans-serif";
        g.fillStyle = "rgba(255,255,255,0.70)";
        g.textAlign = "right";
        g.textBaseline = "middle";
        const steps = 4;
        for (let i = 0; i <= steps; i++) {
            const valor = (maxValor / steps) * i;
            const y = padding.top + chartHeight - (chartHeight * i / steps);
            g.strokeStyle = "rgba(255,255,255,0.08)";
            g.beginPath();
            g.moveTo(padding.left, y);
            g.lineTo(padding.left + chartWidth, y);
            g.stroke();
            g.fillText(valor.toLocaleString("pt-BR", { minimumFractionDigits: 0, maximumFractionDigits: 0 }), padding.left - 10, y);
        }

        function coordenadas(pontos) {
            return pontos.map((p, index) => {
                const x = labels.length === 1 ? padding.left + chartWidth / 2 : padding.left + (chartWidth * index / (labels.length - 1));
                const y = padding.top + chartHeight - ((p.valor / maxValor) * chartHeight);
                return { ...p, x, y };
            });
        }

        function desenharLinha(pontos, corLinha, corArea) {
            if (!pontos.length) return;
            const coords = coordenadas(pontos);

            g.beginPath();
            g.moveTo(coords[0].x, padding.top + chartHeight);
            coords.forEach((p) => g.lineTo(p.x, p.y));
            g.lineTo(coords[coords.length - 1].x, padding.top + chartHeight);
            g.closePath();
            g.fillStyle = corArea;
            g.fill();

            g.beginPath();
            coords.forEach((p, index) => {
                if (index === 0) g.moveTo(p.x, p.y);
                else g.lineTo(p.x, p.y);
            });
            g.strokeStyle = corLinha;
            g.lineWidth = 3;
            g.stroke();
        }

        desenharLinha(pontosPlanejada, "#2563eb", "rgba(37,99,235,0.14)");
        if (pontosRealizada.some(p => p.valor > 0)) {
            desenharLinha(pontosRealizada, "#16a34a", "rgba(22,163,74,0.12)");
        }

        g.textAlign = "center";
        g.textBaseline = "top";
        g.fillStyle = "rgba(255,255,255,0.68)";
        labels.forEach((mes, index) => {
            const x = labels.length === 1 ? padding.left + chartWidth / 2 : padding.left + (chartWidth * index / (labels.length - 1));
            g.fillText(mes, x, padding.top + chartHeight + 10);
        });

        const legendY = 10;
        const legendItems = [
            { label: "Planejado", cor: "#2563eb" },
            { label: "Realizado", cor: "#16a34a" }
        ];
        let legendX = padding.left;
        legendItems.forEach((item) => {
            g.fillStyle = item.cor;
            g.fillRect(legendX, legendY, 16, 4);
            g.fillStyle = "rgba(255,255,255,0.78)";
            g.textAlign = "left";
            g.textBaseline = "middle";
            g.fillText(item.label, legendX + 24, legendY + 2);
            legendX += 110;
        });
    }

    desenharCurvaS(ctx, planejada, realizada);
    window.addEventListener("resize", function () {
        desenharCurvaS(ctx, planejada, realizada);
    });
});
</script>
{% endif %}
{% endblock %}

# ARQUIVO: C:\Users\ACER\Documents\New project\Construtask_2.0_restaurado\Construtask\templates\app\plano_fisico_list.html
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
{% extends "app/base.html" %}
{% load formatters %}

{% block main_class %}main-full{% endblock %}
{% block title %}Cronogramas Fisicos | Construtask{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<div class="toolbar">
    <div>
        <h2>Cronogramas Fisicos</h2>
        <p>Versionamento, baselines e acompanhamento do planejamento fisico por obra.</p>

            </tbody>

            {% endif %}
            {% if risco.status == 'EM_TRATAMENTO' %}
            <form method="post">{% csrf_token %}<input type="hidden" name="acao" value="mitigar"><button class="btn" type="submit">Marcar Mitigado</button></form>
            {% endif %}
            {% if pode_fechar %}
            <form method="post">{% csrf_token %}<input type="hidden" name="acao" value="fechar"><button class="btn" type="submit">Fechar Risco</button></form>
            {% endif %}
            {% if risco.status == 'FECHADO' or risco.status == 'CANCELADO' %}
            <form method="post">{% csrf_token %}<input type="hidden" name="acao" value="reabrir"><button class="btn secondary" type="submit">Reabrir</button></form>
            {% endif %}
            {% if pode_editar and risco.status != 'FECHADO' %}
            <form method="post">{% csrf_token %}<input type="hidden" name="acao" value="cancelar"><button class="btn secondary" type="submit">Cancelar</button></form>
            {% endif %}
        </div>
    </div>
</section>

<section class="panel">
    <h3>Historico do Risco</h3>
    {% if historico %}
    <table class="compact-table">
        <thead>
            <tr>
                <th>Data</th>
                <th>Acao</th>
                <th>Usuario</th>
                <th>Observacao</th>
            </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>
            {% for item in historico %}
            <tr>
                <td>{{ item.timestamp|date:"d/m/Y H:i" }}</td>
                <td>{{ item.get_acao_display }}</td>
                <td>{{ item.usuario.username }}</td>
                <td class="wrap-text">{{ item.observacao|default:"-" }}</td>
            </tr>
            {% endfor %}
        </tbody>
    </table>
    {% else %}
    <p class="empty">Nenhum historico registrado.</p>
    {% endif %}
</section>
{% endblock %}

                <tr><th>Obra</th><td>{{ solicitacao.obra.codigo }} - {{ solicitacao.obra.nome }}</td></tr>
                <tr><th>Centro de custo principal</th><td>{% if solicitacao.plano_contas %}{{ solicitacao.plano_contas.codigo }} - {{ solicitacao.plano_contas.descricao }}{% else %}-{% endif %}</td></tr>
                <tr><th>Solicitante</th><td>{{ solicitacao.solicitante }}</td></tr>
                <tr><th>Data</th><td>{{ solicitacao.data_solicitacao|date:"d/m/Y" }}</td></tr>
                <tr><th>Descricao</th><td class="wrap-text">{{ solicitacao.descricao|default:"-" }}</td></tr>
                <tr><th>Observacoes</th><td class="wrap-text">{{ solicitacao.observacoes|default:"-" }}</td></tr>
            </tbody>
        </table>
    </div>

    <div class="panel">
        <h3>Workflow e Relacionamentos</h3>
        <table class="compact-table">
            <tbody>
                <tr><th>Status</th><td><span class="badge bg-{{ solicitacao|workflow_badge_class }}">{{ solicitacao.get_status_display }}</span> <small class="text-muted">{{ solicitacao|workflow_stage_display }}</small></td></tr>
                <tr><th>Enviado para aprovacao</th><td>{% if solicitacao.enviado_para_aprovacao_por %}{{ solicitacao.enviado_para_aprovacao_por.username }} em {{ solicitacao.enviado_para_aprovacao_em|date:"d/m/Y H:i" }}{% else %}-{% endif %}</td></tr>
                <tr><th>Aprovado por</th><td>{% if solicitacao.aprovado_por %}{{ solicitacao.aprovado_por.username }} em {{ solicitacao.aprovado_em|date:"d/m/Y H:i" }}{% else %}-{% endif %}</td></tr>
                <tr><th>Ultimo parecer</th><td>{{ solicitacao.parecer_aprovacao|default:"-" }}</td></tr>
                <tr><th>Valor estimado</th><td>{{ solicitacao.valor_estimado_total|money_br }}</td></tr>
                <tr><th class="text-right">Cotacoes</th><td class="money">{{ solicitacao.cotacoes.count }}</td></tr>
                <tr><th class="text-right">Resultados em Compras e Contratacoes</th><td class="money">{{ compromissos_resultantes|length }}</td></tr>
            </tbody>
        </table>
        <form method="post" style="margin-top:12px;">
            {% csrf_token %}
            <div class="field">
                <label for="id_parecer_aprovacao_solicitacao">Parecer</label>
                <textarea id="id_parecer_aprovacao_solicitacao" name="parecer_aprovacao" rows="3" placeholder="Opcional no envio/aprovação e obrigatório na devolução para ajuste.">{{ solicitacao.parecer_aprovacao }}</textarea>
            </div>
            <div class="actions">
                {% if pode_enviar_para_aprovacao and solicitacao.status == "RASCUNHO" %}
                <button type="submit" class="btn" name="acao" value="enviar_para_aprovacao">Enviar para Aprovação</button>
                {% endif %}
                {% if pode_aprovar and solicitacao.status == "EM_APROVACAO" %}
                <button type="submit" class="btn" name="acao" value="aprovar">Aprovar</button>
                <button type="submit" class="btn secondary" name="acao" value="retornar_para_ajuste">Retornar para Ajuste</button>
                {% endif %}
            </div>
        </form>
    </div>
</section>

<section class="grid-2">
    <div class="panel">
        <h3>Cotacoes Vinculadas</h3>
        {% if solicitacao.cotacoes.all %}
        <table class="compact-table">

                    <th>Status</th>

                    <td>{{ cotacao.fornecedor }}</td>
                    <td>
                        <span class="badge bg-{{ cotacao|workflow_badge_class }}">{{ cotacao.get_status_display }}</span>
                        <div><small class="text-muted">{{ cotacao|workflow_stage_display }}</small></div>
                    </td>
                    <td>{{ cotacao.data_cotacao|date:"d/m/Y" }}</td>
                </tr>
                {% endfor %}
            </tbody>
        </table>
        {% else %}
        <p class="empty">Ainda nao ha cotacoes vinculadas.</p>
        {% endif %}
    </div>

    <div class="panel">

                </tr>
            </thead>

                </tr>
                {% endfor %}
            </tbody>
        </table>
        {% else %}
        <p class="empty">Nenhum contrato ou pedido gerado a partir desta solicitacao.</p>
        {% endif %}
    </div>
</section>

<section class="panel">
    <h3>Itens</h3>
    {% if solicitacao.itens.all %}
    <table class="compact-table">
        <thead>

{% extends "app/base.html" %}

{% block title %}Solicitacao de Compra | Construtask{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<div class="form-page-shell">
<div class="panel">
    <h2>Nova Solicitacao de Compra</h2>
    <p>Registre a demanda inicial com os centros de custo e os itens tecnicos que serao enviados para cotacao.</p>
    <form method="post">
        {% csrf_token %}
        {% for field in form %}
        <div class="field">
            <label for="{{ field.id_for_label }}">{{ field.label }}</label>
            {{ field }}
            {% if field.errors %}
            <div class="message error" style="margin-top:8px;">{{ field.errors|striptags }}</div>
            {% endif %}
        </div>
        {% endfor %}

        <div class="field">
            <label>Itens da Solicitacao</label>
            {{ item_formset.management_form }}
            {% if item_formset.non_form_errors %}
            <div class="message error" style="margin-bottom:10px;">{{ item_formset.non_form_errors }}</div>
            {% endif %}
            <table class="compact-table item-table" id="solicitacao-itens-table">
                <thead>
                    <tr>
                        <th>Centro de Custo</th>
                        <th>Descricao Tecnica</th>
                        <th>Unidade</th>
                        <th class="text-right">Quantidade</th>
                        <th>Excluir</th>
                    </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody>
                    {% for item_form in item_formset %}
                    <tr class="solicitacao-item-row">
                        <td>
                            {{ item_form.id }}
                            {{ item_form.plano_contas }}
                            {{ item_form.plano_contas.errors }}
                        </td>
                        <td>
                            {{ item_form.descricao_tecnica }}
                            {{ item_form.descricao_tecnica.errors }}
                        </td>
                        <td>
                            {{ item_form.unidade }}
                            {{ item_form.unidade.errors }}
                        </td>
                        <td class="text-right">
                            {{ item_form.quantidade }}
                            {{ item_form.quantidade.errors }}
                        </td>
                        <td>
                            {% if item_form.instance.pk %}
                                {{ item_form.DELETE }}
                            {% else %}
                                <input type="checkbox" disabled>
                            {% endif %}
                        </td>
                    </tr>
                    {% endfor %}
                </tbody>
            </table>
            <div class="actions" style="margin-top:12px;">
                <button class="btn secondary" type="button" id="add-solicitacao-item">Adicionar Centro de Custo</button>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="actions">
            <button class="btn" type="submit">Salvar</button>
            <a class="btn secondary" href="{% url 'solicitacao_compra_list' %}">Voltar</a>
        </div>
    </form>
</div>
</div>

<template id="solicitacao-item-empty-row">
    <tr class="solicitacao-item-row">
        <td>
            __ID_FIELD__
            __PLANO__
        </td>
        <td>__DESCRICAO__</td>
        <td>__UNIDADE__</td>
        <td class="text-right">__QUANTIDADE__</td>
        <td><input type="checkbox" disabled></td>
    </tr>
</template>

<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
    const addButton = document.getElementById("add-solicitacao-item");
    const totalForms = document.getElementById("id_itens-TOTAL_FORMS");
    const tbody = document.querySelector("#solicitacao-itens-table tbody");
    const template = document.getElementById("solicitacao-item-empty-row").innerHTML;
    const emptyForm = {
        idField: `{% filter escapejs %}{{ item_formset.empty_form.id }}{% endfilter %}`,
        plano: `{% filter escapejs %}{{ item_formset.empty_form.plano_contas }}{% endfilter %}`,
        descricao: `{% filter escapejs %}{{ item_formset.empty_form.descricao_tecnica }}{% endfilter %}`,
        unidade: `{% filter escapejs %}{{ item_formset.empty_form.unidade }}{% endfilter %}`,
        quantidade: `{% filter escapejs %}{{ item_formset.empty_form.quantidade }}{% endfilter %}`,
    };

    addButton.addEventListener("click", function () {
        const index = Number(totalForms.value);
        let html = template
            .replace("__ID_FIELD__", emptyForm.idField.replace(/__prefix__/g, index))
            .replace("__PLANO__", emptyForm.plano.replace(/__prefix__/g, index))
            .replace("__DESCRICAO__", emptyForm.descricao.replace(/__prefix__/g, index))
            .replace("__UNIDADE__", emptyForm.unidade.replace(/__prefix__/g, index))
            .replace("__QUANTIDADE__", emptyForm.quantidade.replace(/__prefix__/g, index));
        tbody.insertAdjacentHTML("beforeend", html);
        totalForms.value = index + 1;
    });
});
</script>
{% endblock %}

                    {% endfor %}
                {% else %}
                <div>Usuario ou senha invalidos.</div>
                {% endif %}
            </div>
            {% endif %}

            <form method="post">
                {% csrf_token %}
                <div class="login-field">
                    <label for="id_username">Usuario</label>
                    <input type="text" name="username" id="id_username" required autofocus>
                </div>
                <div class="login-field">
                    <label for="id_password">Senha</label>
                    <input type="password" name="password" id="id_password" required>
                </div>
                <label class="login-remember" for="id_remember">
                    <input type="checkbox" id="id_remember">
                    <span>Lembrar-me</span>
                </label>
                <button type="submit" class="btn login-submit">Entrar</button>
            </form>
        </div>

        <div class="login-footer">
            <small>Sistema de gestao construtiva</small>
            <div style="margin-top:8px;">
                <a href="{% url 'termos_uso' %}">Termos de Uso</a> |
                <a href="{% url 'politica_privacidade' %}">Politica de Privacidade</a>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>
</div>
{% endblock %}

# ARQUIVO: C:\Users\ACER\Documents\New project\Construtask_2.0_restaurado\Construtask\templatetags\formatters.py
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
from decimal import Decimal, InvalidOperation, ROUND_DOWN

from django import template

from Construtask.status_semantics import get_status_badge_class, get_status_stage_label

register = template.Library()


@register.filter
def trunc2(value):
    if value in (None, ""):
        return "0,00"

    try:
        decimal_value = Decimal(str(value))
    except (InvalidOperation, ValueError, TypeError):
        return value

    decimal_value = decimal_value.quantize(Decimal("0.01"), rounding=ROUND_DOWN)
    return f"{decimal_value:.2f}".replace(".", ",")


@register.filter
def money_br(value):
    if value in (None, ""):
        value = Decimal("0")

    try:
        decimal_value = Decimal(str(value))
    except (InvalidOperation, ValueError, TypeError):
        return value

    decimal_value = decimal_value.quantize(Decimal("0.01"), rounding=ROUND_DOWN)
    sinal = "-" if decimal_value < 0 else ""
    decimal_value = abs(decimal_value)
    inteiro, fracao = f"{decimal_value:.2f}".split(".")
    inteiro_formatado = f"{int(inteiro):,}".replace(",", ".")
    return f"{sinal}$ {inteiro_formatado},{fracao}"


@register.filter
def workflow_badge_class(value):
    return get_status_badge_class(value)


@register.filter
def workflow_stage_display(value):
    return get_status_stage_label(value)

# ARQUIVO: C:\Users\ACER\Documents\New project\Construtask_2.0_restaurado\Construtask\tenant_querysets.py
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
from django.db import models
from django.db.models import Q


class TenantScopedQuerySet(models.QuerySet):
    def _field_names(self):
        return {field.name for field in self.model._meta.fields}

    def for_empresa(self, empresa, field_name="empresa"):
        if field_name not in self._field_names():
            return self
        if not empresa:
            return self.none()
        return self.filter(**{field_name: empresa})

    def for_obra(self, obra, field_name="obra"):
        if field_name not in self._field_names():
            return self
        if not obra:
            return self.none()
        return self.filter(**{field_name: obra})

    def for_obras(self, obras, field_name="obra", include_null=False):
        if field_name not in self._field_names():
            return self
        if hasattr(obras, "values_list"):
            obra_ids = list(obras.values_list("id", flat=True))
        else:
            obra_ids = [getattr(obra, "pk", obra) for obra in (obras or []) if getattr(obra, "pk", obra)]
        if not obra_ids and not include_null:
            return self.none()
        filtro = Q(**{f"{field_name}__in": obra_ids}) if obra_ids else Q()
        if include_null:
            filtro |= Q(**{f"{field_name}__isnull": True})
        return self.filter(filtro)

    def for_user(self, user, empresa_field="empresa", obra_field="obra"):
        if not getattr(user, "is_authenticated", False):
            return self.none()
        if getattr(user, "is_superuser", False):
            return self

        from .permissions import get_empresa_do_usuario, get_obras_permitidas

        field_names = self._field_names()
        queryset = self
        empresa = get_empresa_do_usuario(user)

        if empresa_field in field_names:
            if not empresa:
                return self.none()
            queryset = queryset.filter(**{empresa_field: empresa})

        if obra_field in field_names:
            include_null = self.model._meta.get_field(obra_field).null
            queryset = queryset.for_obras(
                get_obras_permitidas(user),
                field_name=obra_field,
                include_null=include_null,
            )
        return queryset

    def for_request(self, request, empresa_field="empresa", obra_field="obra"):
        return self.for_user(getattr(request, "user", None), empresa_field=empresa_field, obra_field=obra_field)


TenantScopedManager = models.Manager.from_queryset(TenantScopedQuerySet)
